title: How to get Connected Boards to move/delete items between all groups in board?
excerpt:
I have 3 boards: 1 is a source board, 2 are connected boards. I have the source board being mirrored in each of the connected boards. Is there a way for me to connect the movement/deletion of items? 
Everything is mirror…

posts.author: BTindall (Berkys)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have 3 boards: 1 is a source board, 2 are connected boards. I have the source board being mirrored in each of the connected boards. Is there a way for me to connect the movement/deletion of items?

Everything is mirroring correctly, but I have an automation on my source board to move things based on status to different groups. That isn’t being mirrored and neither is me deleting items. Is there a way to do that?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: There is a way with an app called ‘Same Item Multiple Boards’ but I don’t know of a native way

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Berkys, alternative apps to check out are Mirror Column Automations - https://auth.monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000109/mirror-column-automations and Mirror Automations Mirror Automations - monday.com Marketplace
